2146100.name: Epic Naval Battle Simulator
2146100.description:
In Epic Naval Battle Simulator, you are able to create the fleet of your dreams! You can now use Age of sail ships in a online mode, and iron clads in Battle Simulator more! But when the game is complete, you will be able to use any ship class from Age of sail, all the way up to modern day! The Yamato class fighting the Bismarck class, the Monitor fighting a Sloop! Anything naval battle you can think of, in Epic Naval Battle Simulator!

You are able to place down ships, as each adds to an overall point system! Place down red and blue ships and fight! You can even place down red ships in any fleet formation, and save it for a challenge for lots of different fleet combos!
2146100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
